lesson: Need to restart server after route changes
Google Translate API works via /api/translate proxy route, needs URL encoding for special chars
Tailwind gradient classes work in dark mode, use bg-gradient-to-r
Modified dashboard header indicator from red/STATIC to green/LIVE with pulse
sed works for code rename but DB field names (pharosNote) should not be changed - breaks Prisma schema
glassmorphism + deep navy theme works. Got 8.5/10 rating
Check constants.ts and Header.tsx for hardcoded GitHub URLs

Agent only renamed partial occurrences. Engine check was too weak (http_status only). MUST use grep_content to verify OLD name is gone AND new name exists. Never trust http_status alone for content changes.
Agent timed out TWICE. PostHog was unused file — simple delete fixed it. Lesson: for removal tasks, give agent the EXACT file to delete, not 'find and fix'. Also: env.ts references need cleanup.
Retry worked (detected timeout, spawned attempt 2) but agent still failed. Problem: prompt was too open-ended. Fix: for retry, give EXACT commands to run, not descriptions.
